title: antennaria alpina var. stolonifera
intro: Antennaria alpina var. stolonifera, also known as Mountain Everlasting or Mountain Snapdragon, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are said to help treat various health issues, including colds, fever, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Antennaria alpina var. stolonifera include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health concerns.
